title: Migrate gf2 (and verify this repo) to rules.toml as deliverable
description:
Migrate gf2 (and re-verify this repo) to `.jit/rules.toml` as a deliverable, using the migration code BEFORE Task D removes it.

## Background

Part of Scope Expansion 2. Pre-1.0 the only jit consumers are this repo (already dogfooded) and `../gf2`. This is an operational (lead-driven) task. See `dev/active/f6a704d0-expansion2-plan.md` §4 and `dev/active/f6a704d0-handoff-2.md` (gf2 analysis). Depends on tasks A and B.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] [hard] The new jit binary is installed (`cargo install --path crates/jit`) and gf2's running server is restarted on it.
- [ ] [hard] gf2's `.jit` is git-snapshotted, then `jit init` migrates it: `.jit/rules.toml` + `.jit/schemas/` written, `require_type_label` stripped, config reduced to behavioral keys.
- [ ] [hard] gf2's `jit validate` output is verified unchanged vs the pre-migration baseline; gf2 `.jit` changes committed.
- [ ] [hard] This repo re-verified green under the final binary.
